steps.title: Punctuate the series
steps.content: The sculptures had been cut, bent, and welded. These are three parallel past participles in a simple series.

steps.title: Keep and with welded
steps.content: A incorrectly places a comma after "and," C uses a semicolon in a simple list, and D omits the comma after "cut." The correct series is "cut, bent, and welded," with commas separating the parallel participles. The answer is B.
